title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same features as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer; use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embeddings inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, multi-user, dark mode, mobile).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, model management, streaming chat.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and autoscaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models (macOS/Linux/Windows).

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI/CD pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo showing how to build a RAG system with Ollama, ChromaDB, and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama REST API with GenServer and streaming support.

title: ollama-cpp
summary: Reddit discussion on how llama.cpp powers Ollama and upcoming GGUF features.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts against notes and summarize content.
